final_response.suspected_root_cause: Report-worker is in a crash loop after a segmentation fault triggered repeated restarts and failed health checks.
next_steps: Inspect the crash signature around the segmentation fault before restarting more workers.
Roll back or isolate the faulty build if the crash signature is new.
final_response.manager_summary: The worker outage is caused by an application crash loop, which is now affecting upstream availability.
